metadata.source: DOJ Epstein Files Transparency Act Release - Final (Jan 30, 2026)

persons.name: Jeffrey Epstein

key_evidence.source: FBI Agent Testimony, Grand Jury, May 2007

key_evidence.quote: [One girl] told Mr. Epstein that she was in high school, and actually told him her true age, which was under 18.

2026_revelations: Xbox Live account permanently banned December 2013
Plans to seize $80 billion in frozen Libyan assets with 10-25% fee
Donated to Friends of IDF, Jewish National Fund, National Council of Jewish Women
Invested $1.5M in Israeli company Carbyne
Anonymous FBI source alleged Mossad connections

persons.name: Ghislaine Maxwell
charges_convicted: Conspiracy to entice minor to travel

key_evidence.quote: MAXWELL played a critical role in the grooming and abuse of minor victims that took place in locations including New York, Florida, and New Mexico.

2026_revelations: 2020 mugshot publicly released
Inappropriate email exchanges with Casey Wasserman (2003)

persons.name: Elon Musk

key_evidence.quote: when will the 'wildest party on your island' be?

persons.context: Email correspondence between Musk and Epstein revealed in Jan 30, 2026 release
persons.notes: Musk has not publicly commented on the email. Context and tone of relationship unclear from limited correspondence.

persons.name: Bill Gates

key_evidence.quote: sex with Russian girls that gave him a sexually transmitted infection which required antibiotics to treat

2026_revelations: Visited Epstein's NYC house October 2009 (with Jeff Bezos, per Peggy Siegal email)
Two 2013 emails from Epstein to himself alleging STI from 'Russian girls'
Multiple photographs with Epstein released
persons.context: Gates previously acknowledged 'meetings' with Epstein for philanthropic discussions, expressed regret
persons.notes: Allegations in emails are unverified self-correspondence from Epstein.

persons.name: Ehud Barak
2026_revelations: He and wife Nili Priel stayed in Epstein-owned NYC apartment on multiple occasions
Photographs with Epstein released
persons.context: Barak has previously acknowledged knowing Epstein through business/political contexts
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing. Relationship appears political/business in nature.

persons.name: Anil Ambani
2026_revelations: Regular contact with Epstein from 2017-2019
Exchanged texts and emails seeking Epstein's help arranging meetings with Kushner, Bannon
Discussed political and business matters ahead of PM Modi visits
Received invitation to Epstein's private Caribbean island
persons.context: Communications appear focused on political access and business connections
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing. Relationship appears transactional/networking in nature.

persons.name: Richard Branson

key_evidence.quote: It was really nice seeing you yesterday...Anytime you're in the area would love to see you. As long as you bring your harem!
key_evidence.significance: Troubling language suggesting knowledge of Epstein's activities

persons.context: Branson has not publicly commented on this email
persons.notes: The phrase 'bring your harem' raises serious questions about Branson's awareness.

persons.name: Bill Clinton
2026_revelations: Photographs in private plane and hot-tub released Dec 19, 2025
Oct 2009 email: visited Epstein's house with Jeff Bezos (per Peggy Siegal)
Unverified 2019 FBI tip alleged yacht incident with Bush Sr. (no evidence provided)
December releases 'focused heavily on Clinton' per NYT
persons.context: Named in flight logs and various documents. Flights primarily during humanitarian work period.
persons.notes: Spokesperson stated Clinton knew nothing of crimes and has not spoken to Epstein in over a decade. Being in photos/documents does not imply wrongdoing.

persons.name: Donald Trump
2026_revelations: Photo with Epstein and Maxwell (EFTA00000468) briefly removed from DOJ website Dec 19-21, 2025
Listed as passenger on at least 8 flights on Epstein's jet between 1993-1996
One 2020 email alleged he flew 'many more times than previously reported'
Dec 23 release included direct rape allegation (unverified)
Fake postcard to Larry Nassar mentioning Trump (DOJ confirmed fake via FBI analysis)
Unverified 2020 FBI tip about 1984 incident (timeline inconsistencies noted by Snopes)
FBI report citing 'credible' source claimed Trump 'compromised by Israel'
DOJ statement Dec 23: 'untrue and sensationalist claims made against President Trump...submitted to FBI right before 2020 election. To be clear: the claims are unfounded and false'
persons.context: Signed Epstein Files Transparency Act Nov 19, 2025. Has stated he 'was not a fan' of Epstein and banned him from Mar-a-Lago.
persons.notes: Trump-related allegations in 2026 releases appear in unverified FBI tips with major credibility issues. DOJ specifically flagged multiple items as false/fake.

persons.name: Narendra Modi

key_evidence.quote: The Indian Prime Minister Modi took advice. and danced and sang in Israel for the benefit of the US president. They had met a few weeks ago. IT WORKED
key_evidence.significance: Epstein claimed to have advised Modi on Israel visit

persons.context: 2017 email suggests Epstein advised Modi to visit Israel for political purposes
persons.notes: Email is Epstein's claim; no evidence Modi solicited or acted on advice. May be Epstein self-aggrandizement.

persons.name: Thorbjørn Jagland
2026_revelations: Planned family vacation on Epstein's private island
Later cancelled the vacation
persons.context: Planning vacation suggests social connection; cancellation may indicate awareness
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing. No evidence vacation occurred.

persons.name: Mette-Marit, Crown Princess of Norway
2026_revelations: Email exchanges with Epstein from 2011-2014
Apologized for 'poor judgement' following Jan 30 release
persons.context: Nature of email exchanges not fully disclosed
persons.notes: Public apology suggests inappropriate contact. No specific allegations of wrongdoing.

persons.name: Miroslav Lajčák
2026_revelations: Emails between Epstein and Lajčák discussing 'young women'
Resigned following release of emails
persons.context: Resignation suggests damaging content in emails
persons.notes: Specific nature of discussions unclear. Resignation indicates serious concerns.

persons.name: Howard Lutnick
2026_revelations: Invited to lunch with Epstein in 2012
Previously stated he severed ties with Epstein in 2005
persons.context: 2012 invitation contradicts claimed 2005 severance of ties
persons.notes: Unclear if lunch occurred. Timeline discrepancy noted.

persons.name: Peter Mandelson
2026_revelations: Documents show Epstein sent Mandelson money between 2003-2004
Photographs with Epstein released
persons.context: Nature and purpose of payments unclear
persons.notes: Mandelson has not publicly commented on payments revealed in files.

persons.name: George J. Mitchell
persons.role: Former U.S. Senator / Senate Majority Leader
2026_revelations: Email communication with Epstein in 2013
Previously accused in 2019 of having sex with Epstein victim (denied)
persons.context: Mitchell has strongly denied all allegations
persons.notes: 2013 emails suggest ongoing contact despite accusations.

persons.name: Casey Wasserman

key_evidence.quote: missed her and wished to see her in a tight leather outfit, while Maxwell offered Wasserman a massage that can 'drive a man wild'
key_evidence.source: 2003 Email correspondence between Maxwell and Wasserman
key_evidence.significance: Inappropriate sexual communication with convicted sex trafficker

2026_revelations: Sexually charged email exchanges with Maxwell from 2003
Publicly responded with regret and apology
Distanced himself from Epstein while acknowledging Maxwell association
persons.context: Wasserman's public statement acknowledges 'poor judgment' and apologizes
persons.notes: No allegations of criminal activity. Emails show inappropriate relationship with Maxwell.

persons.name: Ariane de Rothschild
2026_revelations: Extensive email contact with Epstein
Epstein portrayed as informal adviser during internal Rothschild name dispute
Draft agreement Oct 5, 2015: $25M payment to Epstein's Southern Trust Company
Payment for 'introductions and strategic/tax-risk advice' re: Swiss banking investigations
persons.context: Relationship appears business/advisory in nature focused on Swiss banking issues
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing. $25M consulting contract reported by WSJ and Le Monde.

persons.name: Dean Kamen
2026_revelations: 2013 email detailing plans to spend a night on Epstein's island
persons.context: Unclear if visit occurred or was merely discussed
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing. Kamen has not publicly commented.

persons.name: Steven Sinofsky
2026_revelations: Email communication with Epstein
Sought business advice from Epstein
persons.context: Relationship appears business/advisory in nature
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing.

persons.name: Steve Tisch
2026_revelations: Email correspondence with Epstein discussing 'introducing women' to Tisch
persons.context: Nature of 'women introductions' unclear; raises concerns given Epstein's activities
persons.notes: Tisch has not publicly commented on emails.

persons.name: Dan Ariely
2026_revelations: Email correspondence with Epstein
Maintained six-year friendship from 2010-2016
persons.context: Academic relationship; Epstein known to cultivate relationships with academics
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing.

persons.name: Les Wexner
persons.significance: Primary documented source of Epstein's wealth
key_facts: Granted power of attorney to Epstein
States he severed ties and was unaware of crimes
2026_revelations: Documents covering attempts to hire criminal defense attorney
FBI efforts to serve 2019 subpoena due to Epstein ties

persons.name: R. Alexander Acosta
key_actions: Later served as Secretary of Labor (2017-2019)

persons.name: Alan Dershowitz
persons.role_in_case: Legal advisor to Epstein defense team during NPA negotiations
persons.notes: Has denied any wrongdoing. Involved in related civil litigation.

persons.name: Prince Andrew
2026_revelations: Photograph appearing to show him kneeling over woman lying on ground
Additional photographs with Epstein released
persons.notes: Settled civil lawsuit in 2022. Has denied all allegations.

persons.name: Bill Richardson
persons.role: Former Governor of New Mexico / U.S. Secretary of Energy
2026_revelations: Met with Epstein at least nine times following Epstein's conviction
One visit to Epstein's island documented
persons.context: Continued contact after conviction raises serious questions
persons.notes: Denied all allegations before his death.

persons.name: Sarah Kellen
persons.notes: Named in NPA immunity provisions. Not charged. Ex-wife of NASCAR driver Brian Vickers (2012 emails released).

persons.name: Lesley Groff
persons.notes: Named in NPA immunity provisions. Not charged.

persons.name: Nadia Marcinkova
persons.notes: Named in NPA immunity provisions. Not charged.

persons.name: Jean-Luc Brunel
persons.context: French modeling agent charged in France with rape of minors
persons.notes: Found dead in prison in February 2022 before trial.

persons.name: Jay Lefkowitz
key_actions: Primary defense counsel during federal investigation

persons.name: Ken Starr
key_actions: Appealed to DOJ on behalf of Epstein
persons.notes: Known for Clinton-Lewinsky investigation.

persons.name: David Rodgers
persons.significance: Maintained flight logs. Key witness on flight operations.

persons.name: Larry Visoski
persons.significance: Long-time pilot. Witness on passengers and operations.

persons.name: Roy Black
persons.significance: High-profile criminal defense attorney on Epstein team

persons.name: Audrey Strauss
persons.significance: Led 2019 SDNY prosecution and Maxwell prosecution

persons.name: Karyna Shuliak
key_facts: Last person outside MCC to speak with Epstein (20-min call evening before death)
Named largest beneficiary in The 1953 Trust
Received 32.73-carat diamond ring 'in contemplation of marriage'
Stood to inherit $100 million and all properties (Manhattan, Paris, NM ranch, Virgin Islands)
persons.notes: Relationship began circa 2010 when she was a dental student. Epstein funded her education. No allegations of wrongdoing.

persons.name: Eva Andersson Dubin
key_facts: Dated Epstein before marrying Glenn Dubin
Named as backup trustee in The 1953 Trust
Family says they were 'horrified' by his conduct
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing. Family has publicly condemned Epstein's behavior.

persons.name: Celina Dubin
key_facts: Eldest daughter of Eva Andersson Dubin and Glenn Dubin
Originally named as major beneficiary in January 2019 trust
Would have inherited Zorro Ranch and Virgin Islands estate
Superseded by Karyna Shuliak in August 2019 trust
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing.

persons.name: Bobby Kotick

key_evidence.quote: I'm all for indoctrinating kids into an economy
key_evidence.significance: Discussion about children and economic indoctrination

key_evidence.quote: The girls and I are going to see Elon Musk at SpaceX tomorrow. Are you around?

2026_revelations: Multiple email exchanges with Epstein
Epstein to Kotick: 'I'm all for indoctrinating kids into an economy'
Discussion about real-world rewards for children: cell phone minutes, iPhone credits, virtual items
Email: 'The girls and I are going to see Elon Musk at SpaceX tomorrow. Are you around?'
Kotick response: 'Thanks, but rather see you. Taking girls after to Bair.'
persons.context: Extensive email correspondence discussing children, gaming economics, and coordinating meetings with Epstein
persons.notes: No public comment from Kotick on disclosed emails. Nature of 'girls' references unclear but concerning given Epstein's activities.

persons.name: Peter Attia

key_evidence.quote: I go into Jeffrey Epstein withdrawal when I don't see him
key_evidence.significance: Shows close relationship despite Epstein's conviction

2026_revelations: Subject: 'Got a fresh shipment' → Epstein responds 'me too' with redacted image
Attia: 'Please tell me you found that picture online.' Epstein: 'Afraid not.'
Attia: 'You know the biggest problem with becoming friends with you. The life you lead is so outrageous yet I can't tell a soul.'
Attia: 'I go into Jeffrey Epstein withdrawal when I don't see him'
Attia: 'I think you might have a more interesting life than the Dos Equis guy'
July 11, 2017: Infant son had medical emergency; wife called from ambulance
Stayed in NY for 'important work' instead of going home
2 days later (July 13): coordinating with Epstein: 'Sure. What time?' '9:30' 'Sure, I can come earlier.'
Stayed in NY 10 days instead of going to family — some of that time with Epstein
December 2018 emails show Attia asking 'What's the fallout from the recent story?' after Miami Herald exposé

claims: Not involved in any criminal activity
Claims 'fresh shipment' was about metformin bottles
Says Epstein responded with 'a photograph of an adult woman'
Claims he confronted Epstein after Nov 2018 Miami Herald article
contradictions: December 2018 emails show casual inquiry about 'fallout' rather than confrontation
Continued contact after claimed awareness of crimes

persons.book_incident: Author of 'Outlive' — July 2017 incident where he stayed in NY with Epstein rather than return to family during medical emergency documented in book
persons.context: Longevity medicine doctor who maintained close relationship with Epstein despite 2008 conviction
persons.notes: Attia's explanations for email content disputed by context and timing of communications.

persons.name: Christopher Poole

key_evidence.quote: There's a cool guy kid that you should meet, Christopher P. He is only 23.
key_evidence.significance: Epstein expressing interest in meeting 4chan creator

key_evidence.quote: I like Moot a lot. I drove him home. He is very bright.

2026_revelations: EFTA 01992938: Epstein email Oct 20, 2011: 'Last night and this morning fun. Also met some cool people. There's a cool guy kid that you should meet, Christopher P. He is only 23.'
Meeting date: October 20, 2011
/pol/ (Politically Incorrect board) created: October 23, 2011 — 3 DAYS LATER
Boris to Jeffrey: 'Yes, he is great. I had no clue who he was when we met. He'll be a friend.'
Jeffrey: 'I like Moot a lot. I drove him home. He is very bright.'
Defcon organizer (DarkTangent) clarified: Epstein approached for free badges, was warned away
persons.timeline_significance: Meeting with Epstein occurred 3 days before creation of /pol/, one of the internet's most influential political discussion boards
persons.context: Creator of 4chan met with Epstein in October 2011. Epstein expressed admiration and drove him home.
persons.notes: No allegations of wrongdoing. Meeting context suggests networking/tech interest. Timing with /pol/ creation is coincidental but notable.

document_types.phone_records: Multiple documents in DataSet files (333 total documents)

2026_releases.dec_20_2025: Grand jury materials, flight logs, 32-page 2019 FBI presentation
2026_releases.dec_23_2025: ~30,000 files - Trump allegations, fake Nassar postcard
2026_releases.jan_30_2026: 3.5M pages final release - Musk, Gates, Barak, Ambani, etc.

properties.name: Palm Beach Residence
properties.address: 358 El Brillo Way, Palm Beach, FL

properties.name: New York Townhouse
properties.note: Used by Ehud Barak and wife per 2026 files

properties.name: Little St. James Island
properties.notes: Planned visits by Jagland (cancelled), Kamen (2013 email)

corporate_entities.name: Southern Trust Company
corporate_entities.note: For 'introductions and strategic/tax-risk advice' per 2026 files

transparency_act_timeline.bipartisan_criticism: Delayed rollout, heavy redactions, some bypassed via software
